subject: [v2 11/16] mm: handle PMD swap entries in non-present PMD walkers

reviews.author: Lance Yang
reviews.summary: Reviewer Lance Yang noted that the patch is mostly correct and will review it properly in version 3, but did not provide any specific technical feedback or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
Just skimmed it. That should do the trick. Will go through it
properly in v3 :)

Thanks, Lance

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of PMD swap entries in non-present PMD walkers, specifically in the mincore function. It correctly handles migration and device-private PMDs by returning a single answer for the whole PMD range. For PMD swap entries, it checks if the swapcache folio is still valid and if so, returns the uptodate status of that folio. If not, it falls back to checking the per-page swap slots.
